heading: Report to President and Congress
label: 178m Report to President and Congress
text: The Secretaries shall submit to the President and the Congress, no later than , and each year thereafter through 1987, a report on the status of the research, development, and other work underway under this subchapter. Such report shall (1) recommend specific directions for further research, development and other work, and (2) recommend funding levels for various elements of the overall project.December 31, 1980
notes: Amendments1984— substituted “The Secretaries” for “The Secretary of Agriculture and the Secretary of Commerce” and “1987” for “1982”.Pub. L. 98–284
amendments: Amendments1984— substituted “The Secretaries” for “The Secretary of Agriculture and the Secretary of Commerce” and “1987” for “1982”.Pub. L. 98–284
